widgets_values:
SeedVr is not required. Enabled only when needed. The first load is expected to be very long since it will be downloading models. Choose 7b or 3b variant if you have oom issues.


SeedVr 不是必须的，仅在有需要时启用。首次加载时间会较长，因为需要下载模型文件。如果遇到内存不足（OOM）问题，请选择 7B 或 3B 版本。 国内小伙伴可以自行在网上下载。

nodes.title: For special requests | 1 on 1 help contact me at
什么时候需要face detailer？
widgets_values:
针对很多人在直接使用角色 LoRA 时容易出现效果不佳的问题，这里分享一下我个人在创作中的解决思路。
我会先在不加载任何角色 LoRA 的情况下生成基础图像，而是通过正向提示词对角色进行尽可能详细的描述。
在生成完成的最后阶段，我再加入一个面部细化（Face Detailer）流程，用来将你想使用的角色 LoRA 进行“换脸”。

需要注意的是，细化流程中的提示词一定要根据整体画面进行调整，否则很容易得到 LoRA 自带的默认脸型效果。

nodes.title: Face Detailer README
widgets_values:
To address the issue many of you are facing—where using character LoRAs directly leads to poor results—here’s the approach I personally use in my workflow.
I generate the base image without loading any character LoRAs, and instead describe the character in detail within the positive prompts.
After the image is generated, I apply a face detailer workflow at the final stage to effectively “face-swap” using the character LoRA you want.
Make sure to adjust the prompts inside the detailer flow so they match the overall image; otherwise, you may end up with a generic default face from the LoRA.

nodes.title: Skin Contrast 皮肤对比
widgets_values:
This sections adds details to skin to get a more realistic feeling. Good for super realistic character images generation.

欧美或者写实风可考虑打开。平时不推荐。

nodes.title: Intensity - 强度
widgets_values:
1 Means full strength, 0 means no effect

1 为最高强度，0为禁用

nodes.title: Prompting Notes 提示词帮助⚠️
widgets_values:
当提示词有遗漏或者需要强调的时候，可以手动加入
In case of key prompts missing from auto-detection or want to enhance the prompt, add them manually

nodes.title: Use custom prompts？用自定义提示词？
Long Edge Dimension 初始最长边
Few troubleshooting steps \ 一些小帮助
widgets_values:
1. Try changing the seed 🔄
2. Use a different anime image with better head-to-body proportions 🎯
3. Pray and keep rolling🙏✨
---
1. 换个种子试试 🔄
2. 换一张头身比例更好的动漫图 🎯
3. 向阿拉真主祈祷吧，下一张会更好 🙏✨

nodes.title: Enable Skin Contrast Boost? 加强皮肤画质？

widgets_values: Realistic style of a young Asian girl. Remove watermarks.

nodes.title: ← Generation Tips 生图小贴士:
widgets_values:
You can run Preview Image node on the left to preview see the image before SD upscale. Change up the seed until you find the best generation.

Change Prompt/Lora/Seed, preview, no defects? run full workflow. 

In 1st Generation you should be looking at the
 - composition
 - major defects/pose anormalies (small defects will likely be fixed in 2nd generation)

In 2nd Generation, you should be looking at the fine details
 - fingers/toes
 - facial expression
 - text
 - any other small details




你可以运行左边的 Preview Image 节点，在进行 SD 放大之前先预览图像。随机新种子来抽卡。

修改 Prompt / Lora，进行预览，如果没有明显缺陷，再运行完整工作流。

在第一轮生成中，你应该重点关注：
- 构图
- 主要缺陷 / 姿势异常（小缺陷通常可以在第二轮生成中修复）


在第二轮生成中，你应该重点关注细节：
- 手指 / 脚趾
- 面部表情
- 文字
- 其他任何细小的细节

←

nodes.title: Enable ZIT Refinement? 开启Z洗图？
SD UPSCALE Custom Prompt 自定义提示词
widgets_values: 韩风冷色调网红美白滤镜，极致冷白皮，白嫩幼，overexposure，通体雪白。高清现实主义风格，细节丰富，动态光影，8K超清。

nodes.title: Why new prompt? 为什么需要单独提示词？
widgets_values:
Please default this to false, and turn on when neccessary. 

Imagine a prompt like “a person with plump lips and detailed vagina.”
When the image is generated all at once, the model understands the full human anatomy and correctly places plump lips on the face and the detailed vagina between the legs in the proper location.
But if the image is split into smaller sections and each part is generated independently, a section that only contains part of the inner thigh, lower abdomen, or pelvic area might still try to apply “plump lips” or “detailed vagina” there. Since lips and vulva share strong visual similarities (soft, full, pinkish, folded/ridged appearance), the model can easily confuse and mix them up.


默认为关闭，需要时再启用。

想象一个提示词是“一个人有丰满的嘴唇和细致的小穴（阴部）”。
如果整张图一次性生成，模型能够理解整体人体结构，把丰满的嘴唇正确放在脸上，把细致的小穴放在两腿之间的正确位置，解剖学上合理。
但如果把图像分成多个小块分别生成，每一块只看到局部内容。比如某一块只包含大腿内侧、腹部下缘或臀部附近，模型仍然会尝试在这一小块里应用“丰满的嘴唇”或“细致的小穴”这些特征。因为嘴唇和阴部在视觉上都有柔软、饱满、粉嫩、带有褶边/唇形的相似性，模型很容易混淆它们的位置。

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: 极致冷白皮，光滑皮肤，overexposure，19 years old cute Chines girl, 鞠婧祎

nodes.title: Enable Face detailer? 开启脸部重绘？
Additional Prompt Prefixes (额外自定义提示词)
widgets_values: 19岁日本美女，极致冷白皮，白嫩幼，overexposure，细腻毛孔与真实绒毛清晰可见，细节丰富，动态光影，8K超清。真实人像摄影。
